final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg data_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (write_enable) begin
        data_out <= data_in; // Store data when writing is enabled
    end
    // If write_enable is low, data_out retains its value
end

endmodule
